Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defts' Affirmative Defenses
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOHN KARLS Motion To Strike Defendant's Affirmative Defenses. James H. French, Esq. of French & Lyon (415) 597-7813 appearing for Defendant and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike denied. Objections to an answer are brought by demurrer. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 430.20(a) and (b).) Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
